title: About the Connections folder
author: matthew-mx
body:
Hello!
I notice the connections folder is removed from the main branch, but files like nvhls_marshaller.h still include them. Is the main branch compatible with the connections folder in the hybrid_router branch? Or if not, if there is a usable version of such files. Thanks

title: Multiple problems with ArbitratedScratchpad.h
author: ttambe
body:
Hi,

I am currently seeing two bugs in ArbitratedScratchpad.h.

1. When `NumBanks` is 1, the operation becomes incorrect. I was able to easily fix this bug by replacing [L65-L66](https://github.com/NVlabs/matchlib/blob/main/cmod/include/ArbitratedScratchpad.h#L65-L66) with the edits  below: 
```
  static const int log2_nbanks = (NumBanks == 1) ? 1 : nvhls::nbits<NumBanks - 1>::val;
  static const int log2_inputs = (NumInputs == 1) ? 1 : nvhls::nbits<NumInputs - 1>::val;
```
2. When `NumBanks` is not a power of 2 (e.g., 3 or 6), the read operation is incorrect in some corner cases. For example with `NumBanks` = 3,  reading address 0x3 returns an invalid response (i.e., load_rsp.valids = 0).  Can you please help looking into this issue?

Thanks,
-Thierry

title: Test issue to see if Slack integration is still working.
author: ben-k

title: Can't find Pipeline channel definition
author: DiamantisPa
body:
I saw in the documentation that a pipelined version of the channel is possible.

![chanels](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/32773829/144845304-0a969166-93eb-40c1-b325-df36357b2ace.PNG)

But i can't find the definition of the channel in the library and i get an error when i try to instantiate one.

`Connections::Pipeline<Data_t> a;`
`incomplete type is not allowedC/C++(70)`

Are pipelined channels not available in the opensource library?

title: BUFFERSIZE should be BUFFSIZE
author: jack-melchert
body:
BUFFERSIZE does not exist and causes compile errors when you run the makefile
